references.label: Government Analysis Function dashboard guidance
references.appliedTo: Table-dominant service-owner dashboard with clear purpose, audience, and maintained indicators.

references.label: GOV.UK Design System table component
references.appliedTo: Captioned proof tables with row and column headers.

references.label: GOV.UK Design System warning text
references.appliedTo: Fail-closed blocked BAU signoff reason and consequence text.

references.label: NHS service manual accessibility content
references.appliedTo: Plain, task-focused labels and metadata-only permission-denied state.

references.label: WCAG 2.2
references.appliedTo: Keyboard, focus, reduced-motion, and semantic table checks.

references.label: Playwright ARIA snapshots
references.appliedTo: ARIA snapshot verification for exact, stale, and permission-denied route states.
